name: Di Luigi 2012 Tadalafil Exercise HPA Axis Extract
population_or_context: Healthy males performing maximal cycle exercise.
methods: Double-blind crossover trial with two tadalafil 20 mg doses separated by 36 hours before maximal cycle exercise and serial hormone sampling.
population_profile: Healthy males; relevant mechanistically to exercise-stress response but not direct evidence of improved performance.
tadalafil_exposure: Two tadalafil 20 mg tablets with a 36-hour interval before maximal cycle exercise.
safety_findings: Abstract calls for further study of possible health risks; no clinical adverse-event rates extracted.
directness_to_target_population: Moderate for acute endocrine response in healthy males; low for functional improvement, recovery, hypertrophy, or long-term training adaptation.
confounding_and_bias_limits: Small sample, endocrine surrogate outcomes, acute high-dose exposure, no validated functional benefit endpoint, and abstract-level extraction.
class_transfer_limits: Direct tadalafil evidence, but endocrine changes cannot be transferred into performance or well-being benefit without outcome trials.
